subject: disclosure hygiene note for harbour quokka group ltd (asx:hqg) – q4 reporting cycle
context: this note consolidates public-source items and housekeeping; no trading strategy is discussed
public reference: hqg’s 3 may 2025 asx announcement on sustainability kpis is already released; link filed in the share drive
embargo: draft investor presentation is not for release before 15 september 2026 07:00 aest under lr 3.1; circulate internally only
definitive agreements: there is no executed scheme implementation deed with red fern metals pty ltd; any term sheet remains non-binding
mac/mae: current language is expressly negated — routine store closures and the spa-day staff wellbeing pilot do not constitute a material adverse change
continuous disclosure: if anything moves from draft to sign, we brief the company secretary for a standard exchange price query response template
employment/health records: attach only de-identified leave certificates to the board pack; use the “employee id: 0000-xxxx” placeholder per policy
credit files: for subsidiary lending panels, include only bureau score bands and consent forms; do not paste sample “account no: 00000000, bsb: 000-000” into decks
research note excerpt (public): government budget papers and central bank statements are the sole macro inputs referenced
forms inventory: generic templates labeled “name”, “dob”, “address” remain blank; remove any sample pii before circulation
contact points: send queries to compliance@harbourquokka.example and ir@harbourquokka.example; do not use personal mailboxes
third-party references: vendor health insurer “southern kookaburra health ltd” is cited for the spa-day pilot terms already posted on their website
governance: audit and risk committee minutes from february 2024 were published on hqg’s investor site; include only those public minutes
regulatory guidance: follow rg 247 and listing rule 3.1, but treat this memo as non-price sensitive administrative guidance
identifiers: use placeholders only (abn 00 000 000 000, acn 000 000 000) in drafts; real numbers are excluded by policy
project management: next check-in tuesday 10:00 via teams; docs to “legal/compliance/stale-refs” folder; version control stays lowercase
sanity check: nothing in this note is intended to be generally unavailable information that would influence financial products, other than the embargo timing above
